ratings.note: Reaffirmed on enhanced facilities; notes CEL's plan to raise up to Rs250cr via preferential allotment/private placement/QIP; flags exposure to loss-making French subsidiary CTS.
Outlook revised Stable->Positive after Rs210cr QIP (March 2025) improved TOL/TNW from 6.99x (Mar 2024) to 2.57x (Mar 2025); cites growing order book in high-margin SEBU/BTS segment.
ratings.source: CARE Ratings press release, Aug 2025 (via press reports)

ratings.note: TOL/TNW at 2.56x as of 31 Mar 2025; expects capital structure to improve further absent major debt-funded capex.
Outlook revised Stable->Positive; ratings/facility amount unchanged. Conditional on availing proposed facilities within 180 days of the letter.
